meaning: n.[妞峕 楂樺噳鑿滃睘
examples: The tissue culture technology about shoot-tip and stem with auxiliary bud of Kalanchoe Blossfeldian were studied.
The tissue culture technology about shoot-tip and stem with auxiliary bud of Kalanchoe Blossfeldian, which were used as explant, were studied.
The membrane permeability and the content of proline and soluble sugar of Kalanchoe blossfediana leaves were significantly higher than those of the control under serious stress.
